name: Optimum Ventures Ltd.
summary: Optimum Ventures Ltd., together with its subsidiary, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral properties. It holds option agreements to earn up to 100% undivided interests in the Mineral Basin Group with 4 federally located mineral claims; and in Riverside Claim Group with 8 patented mineral claim situated in Hyder Mining District, State of Alaska, Canada. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
